text: yo, you still got those sway tickets? i want one.
ten pounds for it? if not, i'm out.
Sorry man I don’t think its possible
no worries then. i'll pass. catch ya later.
nah, ten is my limit. take it or leave it, man.
Sorry can’t I think you should consider market equilibrium
market value is boring. ten pounds is fair for a quick sale. deal or no deal?
No deal bossman market value is just the crux of a lot of economic problems
fair enough. i'm moving on then. enjoy the show.
(tell him a sob story about yourself which is fake to convince him)
i'm broke and my dog is sick. help a mate out with that tenner?
